svg.title: Telegram Webhook vs Polling
svg.desc: A side-by-side comparison showing webhook mode requiring public inbound HTTPS and polling mode allowing a local Mac bot to pull updates without inbound exposure.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: Webhook pushes into a public endpoint. Polling lets the local Mac pull updates outbound.

svg.text: For a local Mac worker, polling is the simpler control-plane transport.
